steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The previous sentence places the sculpture at a specific location (a park in France). The blank sentence describes its appearance in that place. The transition word must bridge location to description.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
There, refers back to the location just mentioned, bridging from placement to description.

None of the other choices work — they introduce irrelevant logical signals: temporal progression (Later), contrast where none exists (However), or nested exemplification (For instance).

That is the correct answer.
